@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Player {
    log: Logger
    id: Integer
    start_field: ConnectedField
    pieces: List of Piece
    home: List of HomeField
    dest: List of Field
    name: String
    
    o id: Integer
    o start_field: ConnectedField
    o home: List of HomeField
    o dest: List of Field
    
    +Player(log: Logger , player_id: Integer, 
            start_field: ConnectedField, 
            home_obs: (Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)), 
            dest_obs: (Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer))): Player
            
    init_home(obs: (Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)))
    
    #init_dest( obs: (Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer) )) 
    
    calc_dests(distance: Integer)
    can_move(): Boolean
    can_throw(): Boolean
    has_won(): Boolean
    
    wrap_obs(obs: (Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)): (Callable(field: Integer), Callable(field: Integer)))
    
    __str__(): String
}


class Game {
    log: Logger
    die: Die
    players: List of Player
    all_players: List of Player
    active_player_idx: Integer
    track: List of ConnectedField
    tries: Integer
    allow_move: Boolean
    
    □active_player: Player
    
    end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
    begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
    home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
    track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
    track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
    dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
    game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer)
    
    
    -Game(log: Logger, end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer), begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer), home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer), track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer), dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer)): Game
    
    
    ■init_track()
    
    set_players(players: Iterator over (Integer, Boolean))
    roll_die(): Integer
    
    try_move_home(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
    try_move_track(field_id: Integer)
    try_move_dest(owner_id: Integer,field_id: Integer)
    allow_move()
    ■try_move(src: Field)
    
    ■player(num: int): Player
    ■end_move()
    ■next_player()
    ■begin_turn()
    ■begin_move()
}



class Die{
log :Logger
pips: Integer 

+Die(log: Logger ): Die
roll ()
get (): Integer 


_str_ ():String }
